name: interplanetary-bots
title: Interplanetary Bots
author: your-name-here
description: Specialty bot upgrades gated by interplanetary supply chains. Vulcanus construction bot (payload 3, volcanic sprint), Fulgora logistic bot (fastest, lightning-immune, supercap energy), Aquilo roboport (4x charging, 2x stations). Pre-vanilla Field Drone tier on Nauvis. No universal best — each upgrade excels in one dimension.
